builderDescription:
Established in 1988, Narang Realty is a leading real estate developer with a proven track record of delivering high-quality residential and commercial projects across the Mumbai Metropolitan Region. With a portfolio of more than 10 landmark developments spanning approximately 7.1 million square feet and having successfully delivered homes to over3,550 families, the organisation is recognised for its scale, reliability and consistency of execution.

Guided by a commitment to excellence, Narang Realty consistently sets benchmarks that exceed market standards. A strong focus on environmental stewardship underpins its long-term vision, with the company actively advancing towards a net-zero impact. By combining innovation, quality and responsibility, Narang Realty continues to shape the urban landscape with developments designed to stand the test of time.

builderDescription:
About Rustomjee Group
Established in 1995, Rustomjee Group is one of India's leading real estate developers. The firm specializes in building luxurious properties, is innovative in design, and uses sustainable technologies. It has built fine residential townships, sleek commercial spaces, 2 mega townships, 300+ completed buildings, top healthcare institutions, and reputed educational facilities in the country.

RERA Information
P51800079537
Rustomjee Prive MahaRERA - P51800079537

According to the RERA Act 2016 of the Government of India, all projects of the Rustomjee Group including the Rustomjee Prive, are listed on the Maharashtra Government's RERA website under registered projects.

builderDescription:
The Wadhwa Group is a real estate development and construction company established in 1969 and located in Mumbai, India.
The group is one of Mumbai's leading real estate companies and is currently developing residential, commercial and township projects spread across approximately 1.4 million square meters.

Wadhwa Group is one of the top real estate company in Mumbai and India, Wadhwa Group have developed and have underconstruction residential and commerical projects in Mumbai, Thane, Pune, Bangalore, Chennai, Kolkata, Ahmedabad, Mangalore and Delhi. Wadhwa Group is considered as one of the pioneer in real estate industry in India. Wadhwa Group have succesfully completed and given possession of more than 15 projects in India. Currently Wadhwa Group is developing around 28 residential as well as commercial projects spread across major cities of India.

projectDescription:
Artek Park, At BKC Edge 
Low density, Premium living

Welcome to Artek Park, where BKC Edge meets the pinnacle of discreet luxury. A residence so rare, it’s measured in acres, not square feet. With twice the land and half the neighbours, this is low-density living for those who know that space is the true luxury.

More space, inside and out, because true refinement is never crowded.
projectHighlights: ["✅Spread across 1.6 acres ✅G+26 Storey Apartments ✅3, 4 & Penthouses & Jodi bed expansive residences ✅Two residences per floor ✅Cross-ventilated homes ✅Vastu-Compliant Homes ✅Multilevel clubhouse ✅Maximum open spaces ✅Exclusive rooftop amenities ✅Expansive decks in apartments"]
